prompt_text: Customer.io vs Klaviyo pricing and features
response:
# Customer.io vs Klaviyo Comparison

## Pricing Structure

| Feature | Customer.io | Klaviyo |
|---------|------------|---------|
| **Model** | Usage-based | Contact-based + usage |
| **Starting Price** | ~$10-50/month | ~$20/month |
| **Scaling** | Pay per event/send | Pay per contact (tiered) |
| **Contact Cost** | No contact fee | $0.01-0.035 per contact |

**Note:** Pricing fluctuates; verify current rates on their websites.

---

## Key Features Comparison

### **Customer.io Strengths**
- **Event-driven automation** - Real-time triggers based on user behavior
- **Journeys builder** - Sophisticated workflow visual editor
- **Developer-friendly** - Strong API, webhooks, custom code
- **Better for high-volume** - Scales efficiently with events
- **Segment flexibility** - Dynamic, behavior-based segmentation
- **Competitive cost** for transactional + marketing emails

### **Klaviyo Strengths**
- **eCommerce focus** - Native Shopify, WooCommerce integration
- **Pre-built templates** - Extensive email & SMS templates
- **Email design** - Drag-and-drop editor is polished
- **SMS capability** - Strong SMS marketing features
- **Form builder** - Built-in popups and signup forms
- **Reporting** - More intuitive dashboards (easier learning curve)

---

## Feature Detail Breakdown

| Feature | Customer.io | Klaviyo |
|---------|------------|---------|
| Email Marketing | ✅ | ✅✅ |
| SMS Marketing | ✅ (basic) | ✅✅ |
| Push Notifications | ✅✅ | ✅ |
| In-app Messaging | ✅✅ | Limited |
| Webhooks/API | ✅✅ | ✅ |
| Custom Code | ✅✅ | Limited |
| Predictive Analytics | Limited | ✅✅ |
| Form Builder | Limited | ✅✅ |
| eCommerce Integration | ✅ | ✅✅ |

---

## When to Choose Each

### **Choose Customer.io if:**
- You need real-time, event-triggered campaigns
- You have high transaction volume
- Your team is technical/developer-friendly
- You need sophisticated workflow automation
- You want in-app messaging capabilities
- Cost per contact matters less than event costs

### **Choose Klaviyo if:**
- You're running an eCommerce store
- You want SMS + email bundled seamlessly
- You prefer visual, no-code building
- Beautiful email templates are priority
- You need predictive analytics (RFM, CLV)
- Easier onboarding matters

---

## Typical Use Cases

**Customer.io:** SaaS, mobile apps, fintech, products with complex user journeys

**Klaviyo:** Online retail, fashion, beauty, D2C brands, drop-shippers

---

## Bottom Line

- **Budget-conscious, technical:** Customer.io
- **eCommerce-focused:** Klaviyo
- **Best overall for marketing:** Klaviyo (easier)
- **Best for developers:** Customer.io

Both are solid platforms—your choice depends on industry, team skills, and specific needs.
